theme: Lay out unit cells for a target property field
title: Metamaterial Field Layout: Graded-Index Panel Tiling
strategies: uniform tiling: one library type for the whole grid (baseline)
nearest-match: independently pick each cell's closest-effective-property type, ignoring neighbors
one-shot smoothing: nearest-match then a single local-averaging pass
joint relabeling: MRF-style iterated conditional modes / simulated annealing trading pointwise match against interface cost
